title: Course Description Quality Impact on Workflow
description: Interactive p5.js visualization for course description quality impact on workflow
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
p5.js
learningObjectives: Explain how the course-description-analyzer quality score routes textbook generation onto the smooth green path or the rework-heavy orange path
Identify the quality thresholds where a score of 70 or higher proceeds with minimal intervention and 85 or higher yields optimal workflow efficiency
Trace the cascade of downstream effects of a low-quality description: generic concepts, manual correction, and regenerated glossary and chapter artifacts
Predict the 2-3x increase in development time incurred by proceeding with a course description scoring below 70
